workout.name: Swim — Block 1 Mon: snorkel and fins
workout.description:
BLOCK 1 MON — SNORKEL AND FINS (25-yard pool)
• 400m (~18 lengths) — freestyle, warm-up • 200m (~9 lengths) — with fins and snorkel: 50m arms pressed to body, dolphin kick only 50m arms extended forward, dolphin kick only (repeat 2 times) • 800m (~35 lengths) — coordinated freestyle, snorkel + fins Focus: soft catch, powerful push-off, thumb brushes thigh Head still, no side-to-side movement • 600m (~26 lengths) — freestyle, cool-down
TOTAL: ~2000m / ~88 lengths / ~55-65 min
Notes: snorkel — once per week. Watch your head position.
